content: Questa non è la prima volta che vado in bici.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:This is not my first time riding a bicycle
eng:This isn't my first time riding a bicycle
eng:This isn't the first time I've ridden a bicycle
eng:This isn't the first time that I've ridden a bicycle
